title: Comic Tracker Export
description: Self-contained backup file produced by Comic Tracker's Export button and consumed by Import.

app.description: Fixed marker identifying the file as a Comic Tracker export. Import rejects any other value.

version.description: Export format version. Writer emits 2; reader accepts 1 and 2. Any other value is rejected.

exportedAt.description: Epoch milliseconds when the file was written. Informational; ignored on import.

series.description: One tracked manga/manhwa. On import, `title` is required and non-empty; `id` is auto-generated when absent but must be non-empty if present. Every other field has a safe default, and unknown fields are ignored.

id.description: Stable unique identifier (a UUID for app-created records). Used to de-duplicate on merge import. If the field is absent, a UUID is generated on import; if present it must be non-empty (an empty string is rejected).

title.description: Primary (typically English) title. Required and non-empty.

link.description: URL to the series page. May be empty.

linkLabel.description: Optional display label for the link, e.g. "Webtoons".

lastChapter.description: Last chapter read. Negative values are clamped to 0 on import.

status.description: Reading status. Unrecognized values fall back to "reading".

coverType.description: How the cover is stored: "url" uses coverUrl; "file" uses coverDataUrl; "none" shows a placeholder. Unrecognized values fall back to "none".

coverUrl.description: Direct image URL. Used when coverType is "url".

coverDataUrl.description: Base64 data URL of an uploaded cover image, e.g. "data:image/webp;base64,...". Present only when coverType is "file". This is what makes an export self-contained (no external image dependency). Decoded back into a stored image on import.

createdAt.description: Epoch milliseconds the record was created. Defaults to import time if missing or 0.

updatedAt.description: Epoch milliseconds the record last changed. Defaults to import time if missing or 0.

pinned.description: Whether the series is pinned to the top of the list. Absent in version 1 files; defaults to false.
